title: Neon Genesis Evangelion: The End of Evangelion
originalTitle: 新世紀エヴァンゲリオン劇場版 Air／まごころを、君に
posterAlt: Neon Genesis Evangelion: The End of Evangelion (1997) movie poster
tmdbOverview: SEELE orders an all-out attack on NERV, aiming to destroy the Evas before Gendo can advance his own plans for the Human Instrumentality Project. Shinji is pushed to the limits of his sanity as he is forced to decide the fate of humanity.
synopsis: Neon Genesis Evangelion: The End of Evangelion (1997) is a animation, science fiction and drama film from Japan. It's highly rated, holding a strong 8.1 on IMDb. A standout of 1990s cinema, it earns its spot on our lists. It carries a R certification (US rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
